title: 3D Rabbit Hide and Foot
description: Gives a 3d model to rabbit hide and foot based on new rabbit from 26.1
body:
---
> **This project is now part of the "3D Mob Drops resource pack" which you can find**
[here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-mob-drops) 
---
   
**3D Rabbit Hide and Foot**
  
This resource pack gives **3d models** to **rabbit hide** and **rabbit foot items**. These models and textures are based on new redesign of rabbit mob from **Tiny Takeover** update.

Image example:  
![3d rabbit hide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a42a1cc134b42828c1a3735b851c9b5a8769c084_0.webp)
